name: calendars_create
description: Create a new application-managed calendar within a connected calendar profile. The calendar is owned by your application.

parameters.name: profile_id
parameters.description: The profile ID of the connected calendar account to create the calendar in.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Display name for the new calendar.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Hex color code for the calendar (e.g., '#49BED8').
